# 世界数据结构

这个文件由后端 worldSchemas.js 自动生成，用于让模型了解当前世界数据库支持的实体、组件和关系类型。请不要手动编辑本文件；如需调整 schema，请修改代码里的真实 schema 定义。

## Entity Kinds

- player
- character
- scene
- item
- quest
- event
- faction
- lore

## Component Types

- identity
- scene
- stats
- status
- memory
- inventory
- quest
- schedule

## Relationship Types

- located_in
- ownership
- exit_to
- knows
- trust
- affinity
- hostility
- fear
- belongs_to
- unlocks
- requires
- mentions
- related_to
